title: Clocks

products.title: 3 7/8" x 4 7/8" Crystal Clock
products.displayName: 3 7/8" x 4 7/8" Crystal Clock
products.description: Crystal Clock - 1 1/4" thick hand polished and beveled to create the ultimate recognition awards. Optical crystal is 100% lead free and suitable for laser engraving or sandblasting.

products.title: 5" x 6 1/4" Glass Clock with Frosted Top, Polished Edge and Base with Black Plate
products.displayName: 5" x 6 1/4" Glass Clock with Frosted Top, Polished Edge and Base with Black Plate
products.description: Attractive glass clock featuring a frosted glass top accented by polished, beveled edges. Black aluminum engraving plate to carry your customized     message and art work / logo. Silver clock bevel, white dial with three-handmovement. Battery included. Individually gift box. Laser engraveable       plate included.

products.title: 5 5/8" x 7 3/4" Modern Design Clock with Brushed Silver Bezel, Black High Gloss Base, Black Plate
products.displayName: 5 5/8" x 7 3/4" Modern Design Clock with Brushed Silver Bezel, Black High Gloss Base, Black Plate

products.title: 7 1/4" x  8 3/4" Glass Clock with World Dial on Black High Gloss Base, Black Plate
products.displayName: 7 1/4" x  8 3/4" Glass Clock with World Dial on Black High Gloss Base, Black Plate
